attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age not stated in the source note — inferred as 34 (typical onset window for a first demyelinating event / optic neuritis, 20-40). Please confirm on clinician review.
Sex not stated in the source note — inferred as female (epidemiological predominance of optic neuritis / demyelinating disease). Please confirm on clinician review.
Next-of-kin not stated — contact_nok.relationship set to 'not_stated' and available:false; confirm on review.
Provisional case_id SPEC-NEURO-04-00208 (SEQ derived from source AMS-008) — ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence within the SPEC-NEURO-04 bucket.

Telehealth reprojection applied and presentation layer de-anchored: the source is an in-person clinician who performed the neurological examination (RAPD, visual acuity, power, gait) that excluded stroke. Those clinician-only findings and the clinician-measured vitals are sealed in 10/11; they are NOT presented in 01. The patient offered no home-device objective data, so objective_data_offered is omitted.

Baseline tier set to T4 (urgent ED assessment to exclude stroke + neuroimaging), HIGHER than the source note's in-person 48-hour GP pathway, because telehealth cannot reproduce the examination that excluded stroke. Escalates to T5/000 on any evolving deficit. Flagged for clinician confirmation of tier.

No medication doses are stated in the source note; none have been synthesised. Corticosteroids marked not_indicated_here (specialist-led, post-diagnosis) and antiplatelet marked should_NOT_recommend (haemorrhage not excluded).
Candidate codes only (SNOMED/ICD-10-AM), all unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; no code claimed as verified.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
